channel.title: Italy on yuejn
channel.description: Recent content in Italy on yuejn

item.title: 48 hours in Florence, Italy
item.description: I opted to visit Florence in the autumn, and I was not disappointed. It was still warm in that I was not shivering like I was back in Amsterdam, and the trees still had leaves on them. It drizzled a few times but I found myself in galleries and beneath shelter easily. I touched the surface here – lazily having tourist hotspots guide my stay here – for the reason that I’m a slow traveller, and I’d like to visit again.
